overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking at night toward the Temple of Asklepios, entering the ancient Greek temple, and exploring the torchlit courtyard with stone reliefs and burning braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path approaching ancient temple

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between rocky cliffs, approaching the illuminated Temple of Asklepios visible in the distance

entered.detail: large gray rock outcropping lining the left side of the path
old wooden wagon with wheels parked beside the path
unpaved trail winding through the rocky terrain
tall slender dark green trees silhouetted against the night sky
ancient Greek temple with columns and pediment, illuminated by warm torchlight
distant mountain range visible under the moonlit sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path between rocky cliffs at night, with the moon illuminating the scene. The Temple of Asklepios glows with torchlight in the distance, while cypress trees line the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek temple entrance with stone steps and columns

events.description: transitioning from natural rocky terrain to the built stone architecture of the temple approach
entering the temple doorway, transitioning from moonlit exterior to torchlit interior space

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone steps toward the temple entrance, passing between tall cypress trees and decorative columns

notable_agents.action: temple guard or visitor standing near the entrance columns, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
tall fluted columns with ornate capitals framing the temple entrance
large doorway with wooden doors open, revealing the interior passage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone steps of the Temple of Asklepios, passing between monumental columns. The architecture shifts from natural rock to carved stone, and the character approaches the torchlit entrance where an NPC stands guard.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior courtyard with ritual braziers and carved reliefs

events.description: passing through the temple entrance into the interior courtyard with mountain views
discovering the courtyard with stone relief sculptures and burning ritual braziers

agents.ego_description: moving through the temple corridor into the open courtyard, examining the stone reliefs and burning braziers while holding a torch

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the courtyard edge, tending to a brazier

entered.detail: carved stone panels depicting mythological scenes and figures
large stone fire pits with flames burning brightly
tall square stone pillars supporting decorative elements
large ceramic urns with greenery atop the pedestals

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the temple entrance into an open courtyard with panoramic mountain views. The space features carved stone reliefs, burning braziers providing warm light, and stone pedestals with potted plants. An NPC tends to a distant brazier as the character explores the sacred space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit wilderness path into the torchlit sanctuary of the Temple of Asklepios. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path between rocky cliffs and cypress trees, with the distant glow of the temple guiding the way. As the character advances, the natural terrain shifts into carved stone as they ascend monumental steps and pass between towering columns toward a guarded entrance. The scene then opens from the temple interior into a wide courtyard, where the cool moonlight is replaced by the warm flicker of burning braziers and stone reliefs. Finally, the camera explores the sacred space, passing potted plants and stone pedestals against a panoramic backdrop of distant mountains.
